banks.note: Binary on/off gate. CH1 is not a dimmer for measurement purposes.

composition.higher_order_assumption: interactions beyond measured pairs/triples are negligible unless Phase 6 real-cue validation proves otherwise
composition.model_form: base(CH3,CH4) plus gated modifier transfer functions adjusted by composition rules

fixture: RGB Fullcolor Beam Effect Light (36CH; CH1-19 modeled)

compositional.note: Triple-axis rotation; pairwise composition analysis not applicable. Full 6x6x6 grid captured across 6 bases.

gating.note: CH3 >= 128 is dynamic macro scope (out of model)

base_dependence_gate.base_dependence_rule: base-dependent if >=2 of 7 probe channels deviate >25% across bases

geometry_precision.note: Tolerances derived from static-capture metric variation, 1.5x mean as envelope

ch1_gate.rule: CH1=0 blacks out; any CH1>0 is on. CH1 is not a dimmer and must not be used for dual-track brightness.

method.rig: Enttec Open via pyftdi, iPhone Continuity Camera, wall projection

provenance.contamination_reason: AVFoundation device 2 resolved to Capture screen 0 while Continuity Camera was disconnected.

validation.note: Initial validation buckets require model-vs-measure comparison; unresolved is used rather than fabricated pass/fail.
